parameters.subject: =Welcome to Vision Infinity - Invoice for {{ $json.body.plan }} plan
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.owner_name }},

Thank you for choosing Vision Infinity!

You've selected the {{ $json.body.plan }} plan for your business ({{ $json.body.business_name }}).

Your invoice is attached. Please pay Rs. {{ $json.body.total_pkr }} by {{ $json.body.due_date }}.

You can also download your invoice here: {{ $json.body.invoice_pdf_url }}

Once paid, please reply to this email or send a screenshot to our WhatsApp at +92 312 8779368 with your invoice number: {{ $json.body.invoice_number }}.

Welcome aboard,
Vision Infinity Team
